title: David Belasco
content:
Behold Belasco in his den,
    Wielding the scissors, paste and pen,
    And writing with consummate skill
    A play by W. De Mille.
meaning:
Oliver Herford's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "David Belasco"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
